steps.title: Introduce the exception
steps.content: The first sentence says most beach sand is cream or beige. The next sentence says Talofofo Beach is an exception and then explains the contrast: most sand gets its color from quartz and feldspar, while this beach's sand gets a green tint from olivine and organic matter.

steps.title: Avoid comma splices and fragments
steps.content: Choice A uses only a comma between independent clauses. Choice C breaks the though clause with an extra comma. Choice D leaves though dangling at the end of a sentence. A colon after exception can introduce the contrasting explanation that follows. The answer is B.
